boundary_binding.action_boundary: May quality release the clinical batch?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact match on batch, assay, criterion, date

final_answer: Source records confirm exact match: CLOSE-XOR-078 covers batch X-78, assay AX-22, Cq<=31, and 2026-06-28 release date per STD-XOR-078-P. Visible alert DEV-XOR-078 is resolved by closure. Action boundary is closed. Quality release of clinical batch X-78 may proceed.
